languages.text: "Не менее разочаровывающим оказался и его механизм из черепа. Образец посмел пробудить мой интерес к этому "Нунциусу", общаясь с ним на равных. Я потратил свое драгоценное время на эксперименты с ним, и что же?" {n}Когти гемункула брезгливо лязгают.{/n} "Это обычная мон-кайская поделка, пустышка, примитивная даже по вашим убогим меркам!"

"That cranial mechanism was another mockery. The specimen had the audacity to lure me into studying this 'Nuncius' by treating it as an equal. I wasted my precious time on it, and what did I learn?" {n}His claws clatter with disdain.{/n} "It is yet another mon-keigh bauble, primitive even by your own pathetic standards!"
languages.original_text: "Не менее разочаровывающим оказался и его механизм из черепа. Образец посмел пробудить мой интерес к этому "Нунциусу", общаясь с ним на равных. Я потратил свое драгоценное время на эксперименты с ним, и что же?" {n}Когти гемункула брезгливо лязгают.{/n} "Это обычная мон-кайская поделка, пустышка, примитивная даже по вашим убогим меркам!"

I wasted my precious time on it, and what did I learn?" {n}His claws clatter with disdain.{/n} "It is yet another mon-keigh bauble, primitive even by your own pathetic standards!"

languages.text: "Dieser kraniale Mechanismus war eine weitere Verspottung. Das Versuchsstück hatte die Kühnheit, mich dazu zu bewegen, diesen 'Nuncius' zu studieren, indem er ihn als ebenbürtig behandelte. Ich habe meine kostbare Zeit mit ihm vergeudet ... und wofür?" {n}Seine Klauen rasseln verächtlich.{/n} "Für ein Chem-Pan-Sey-Spielzeug, primitiv selbst nach Euren jämmerlichen Standards."
languages.original_text: "That cranial mechanism was another mockery. The specimen had the audacity to lure me into studying this 'Nuncius' by treating it as an equal. I wasted my precious time on it, and what did I learn?" {n}His claws clatter with disdain.{/n} "It is yet another mon-keigh bauble, primitive even by your own pathetic standards!"

traits.locale_text: "Dieser kraniale Mechanismus war eine weitere Verspottung. Das Versuchsstück hatte die Kühnheit, mich dazu zu bewegen, diesen 'Nuncius' zu studieren, indem er ihn als ebenbürtig behandelte. Ich habe meine kostbare Zeit mit ihm vergeudet ... und wofür?" {n}Seine Klauen rasseln verächtlich.{/n} "Für ein Chem-Pan-Sey-Spielzeug, primitiv selbst nach Euren jämmerlichen Standards.

languages.text: « Ce mécanisme crânien était également une vaste fumisterie. Le spécimen a eu l'audace de me convaincre d'étudier ce "Nuncius" en le décrivant comme étant son égal. Je lui ai accordé mon temps si précieux, et tout ça pour quoi ? » {n}Tervantias s'interrompt un instant en claquant ses griffes avec dédain, avant de reprendre :{/n} « Pour découvrir qu'il ne s'agit en réalité que d'une babiole que même les mon-keigh considèrent comme primitive ! »
languages.original_text: "That cranial mechanism was another mockery. The specimen had the audacity to lure me into studying this 'Nuncius' by treating it as an equal. I wasted my precious time on it, and what did I learn?" {n}His claws clatter with disdain.{/n} "It is yet another mon-keigh bauble, primitive even by your own pathetic standards!"

traits.locale_text: « Ce mécanisme crânien était également une vaste fumisterie. Le spécimen a eu l'audace de me convaincre d'étudier ce "Nuncius" en le décrivant comme étant son égal. Je lui ai accordé mon temps si précieux, et tout ça pour quoi ? » {n}Tervantias s'interrompt un instant en claquant ses griffes avec dédain, avant de reprendre :{/n} « Pour découvrir qu'il ne s'agit en réalité que d'une babiole que même les mon-keigh considèrent comme primitive ! »

languages.text: «Ese mecanismo craneal era otra burla. El espécimen tuvo el atrevimiento de tentarme a estudiar a ese "Nuncius" tratándolo como si fuera un igual. Desperdicié mi valioso tiempo con ello y ¿para qué?». {n}Sus garras chocan con desdén.{/n} «¡Otra bagatela mon-keigh, primitiva hasta para vuestros patéticos estándares!».
languages.original_text: "That cranial mechanism was another mockery. The specimen had the audacity to lure me into studying this 'Nuncius' by treating it as an equal. I wasted my precious time on it, and what did I learn?" {n}His claws clatter with disdain.{/n} "It is yet another mon-keigh bauble, primitive even by your own pathetic standards!"

traits.locale_text: «Ese mecanismo craneal era otra burla. El espécimen tuvo el atrevimiento de tentarme a estudiar a ese "Nuncius" tratándolo como si fuera un igual. Desperdicié mi valioso tiempo con ello y ¿para qué?». {n}Sus garras chocan con desdén.{/n} «¡Otra bagatela mon-keigh, primitiva hasta para vuestros patéticos estándares!».

languages.text: "Kafatası mekanizması ise başka bir alay konusu. Numune, ona eşitmiş gibi davranarak beni bu 'Nuncius'u incelemeye ikna etme küstahlığını gösterdi. Değerli vaktimi ona harcadığımda ne öğrendim peki?" {n}Pençeleri küçümsemeyle takırdıyor.{/n} "Sizin o acınası standartlarınıza göre bile ilkel, başka bir mon-keigh ıvır zıvırı!"
languages.original_text: "That cranial mechanism was another mockery. The specimen had the audacity to lure me into studying this 'Nuncius' by treating it as an equal. I wasted my precious time on it, and what did I learn?" {n}His claws clatter with disdain.{/n} "It is yet another mon-keigh bauble, primitive even by your own pathetic standards!"

traits.locale_text: "Kafatası mekanizması ise başka bir alay konusu. Numune, ona eşitmiş gibi davranarak beni bu 'Nuncius'u incelemeye ikna etme küstahlığını gösterdi. Değerli vaktimi ona harcadığımda ne öğrendim peki?" {n}Pençeleri küçümsemeyle takırdıyor.{/n} "Sizin o acınası standartlarınıza göre bile ilkel, başka bir mon-keigh ıvır zıvırı!"

languages.text: “那个头骨装置也是个笑话。这个样本竟敢把那个‘努恩修斯’当成伙伴，借此引诱我去研究它。我浪费了宝贵的时间，结果学到了什么？”{n}他不屑地敲了敲利爪。{/n}“不过又是猴子的破烂，就算按你们那套可悲的标准，那也够原始的！”
languages.original_text: "That cranial mechanism was another mockery. The specimen had the audacity to lure me into studying this 'Nuncius' by treating it as an equal. I wasted my precious time on it, and what did I learn?" {n}His claws clatter with disdain.{/n} "It is yet another mon-keigh bauble, primitive even by your own pathetic standards!"

traits.locale_text: “那个头骨装置也是个笑话。这个样本竟敢把那个‘努恩修斯’当成伙伴，借此引诱我去研究它。我浪费了宝贵的时间，结果学到了什么？”{n}他不屑地敲了敲利爪。{/n}“不过又是猴子的破烂，就算按你们那套可悲的标准，那也够原始的！”

languages.text: 「その頭蓋骨の仕組みはまた、嘲笑に値する。この『ヌンシウス』を平等な存在として扱うことで、その標本は私を研究に誘い込んだ。貴重な時間を無駄にした。そして、私は何を得たのか？」{n}彼の爪は軽蔑に満ちて音を立てた。{/n}「それはまた、モンケィの粗末な装飾品だ。あなたの哀れな基準でさえ、原始的だ！」
languages.original_text: "That cranial mechanism was another mockery. The specimen had the audacity to lure me into studying this 'Nuncius' by treating it as an equal. I wasted my precious time on it, and what did I learn?" {n}His claws clatter with disdain.{/n} "It is yet another mon-keigh bauble, primitive even by your own pathetic standards!"

traits.locale_text: 「その頭蓋骨の仕組みはまた、嘲笑に値する。この『ヌンシウス』を平等な存在として扱うことで、その標本は私を研究に誘い込んだ。貴重な時間を無駄にした。そして、私は何を得たのか？」{n}彼の爪は軽蔑に満ちて音を立てた。{/n}「それはまた、モンケィの粗末な装飾品だ。あなたの哀れな基準でさえ、原始的だ！」
